header.description: Static invoice metadata and customer/vendor details.

rows.description: Line items for the invoice, flattened into 6 fixed rows.

totals.description: Financial summary totals (mapped from invoice header or computed).

semantics: Scalars are single-value lookups from the parent `invoices` and `customers` tables. Row tokens are derived from the child `invoice_items` table, expanded into fixed row slots (1-6). Totals are direct mappings from the invoice header fields.
transformations: Join invoices to invoice_items on invoice_number.
Join invoices to customers on customer_id.
Map invoice_items to fixed row slots 1-6 based on line_no.
Compute line_total as quantity * unit_price if not provided.
Apply currency formatting to all monetary fields.
